buildCommand: pnpm --filter @ritmiq/pwa build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const tries=['dist','../pwa/dist','apps/pwa/dist','../../apps/pwa/dist'];const src=tries.find(p=>fs.existsSync(path.join(p,'index.html')));if(!src){console.error('No build output found in:',tries);process.exit(1)}if(src!=='dist'){fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,'dist',{recursive:true});console.log('Copied',src,'->','dist')}else{console.log('Build output already at dist/')}"
